---
title: "explore"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(jsonlite)

url <- "https://paddlestats.net/json/paddlers/bartonre01"
rebeccajson <- read_json(url, simplifyVector = TRUE)

rebecca <- rebeccajson$results |> as_tibble() |>
  unnest_longer(partners, keep_empty = TRUE) |>
  unnest_wider(col = c(partners))
```

```{r}
rebecca_simple <- rebecca |> group_by(resultId) |> slice(1) |>
  mutate(raceDate = ymd(raceDate))

rebecca_ausable <- rebecca_simple |> filter(raceId == "Ausable")

ggplot(rebecca_ausable, aes(x = raceDate, y = place)) +
  geom_point()
```
